title: Phylo-Movies: Interactive Phylogenetic Tree Interpolation and Visualization
description: Phylo-Movies is software for visualizing topological changes between ordered phylogenetic trees. It provides a browser-based and desktop interface for tree interpolation, sliding-window phylogenetic analyses, recombination examples, rogue-taxa examples, metadata coloring, and movie export.

creators.name: Sakalli, Enes Berk
creators.affiliation: Ludwig Boltzmann Institute for Network Medicine, University of Vienna
